description: This file contains SCSS mixins for button styling variants, including default, outline, and size configurations, used to generate consistent button styles with various states.

methods.name: button-variant
methods.description: Defines styles for button variants with customizable background, border, and color states, including hover, active, and disabled.

methods.name: button-outline-variant
methods.description: Defines styles for outlined button variants with customizable color and state styles.

methods.name: button-size
methods.description: Defines size-related styles for buttons, including padding, font size, and border radius.
